scenario.name: Simple appointment scheduling
scenario.goal: Schedule a routine appointment for next week.
scenario.opening_message: I need to schedule an appointment for next week.
details: The patient prefers Tuesday or Thursday morning.
The patient can provide their date of birth if asked.
The patient should ask one follow-up question about appointment prep.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: I need to schedule an appointment for next week.

events.speaker: Agent
events.text: This call may be recorded for quality and training purposes.

events.speaker: Patient
events.text: Sorry, I had trouble hearing that. I will call back later. Goodbye.
